case_title: JOHN O'ROURKE VS. ESPY, LLC DBA MELA TANDOORI KITCHEN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ESPY, LLC  DBA MELA TANDOORI KITCHEN
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT ESPY, LLC  DBA MELA TANDOORI KITCHEN ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-19-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-19-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,250.00 FILED BY O'ROURKE, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT ESPY, LLC  DBA MELA TANDOORI KITCHEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-19-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ESPY, LLC  DBA MELA TANDOORI KITCHEN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$60.00) SERVED FEB-04-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESPY, LLC  DBA MELA TANDOORI KITCHEN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-19-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'ROURKE, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPY, LLC  DBA MELA TANDOORI KITCHEN $750.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $750.00, THE EVIDENCE ESTABLISHED THAT PLAINTIFF CONTRACTED WITH THE PAINTER LUIS RODRIGUEZ AND THAT PLAINTIFF IS RESPONSIBLE TO PAY LUIS RODRIGUEZ. DEFENDANT MAY SATISFY THE JUDGMENT BY TENDERING PAYMENT BY CHECK JOINTLY TO JOHN O'ROURKE AND LUIS RODRIGUEZ. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF O'ROURKE, JOHN C/O JEAN O' ROURKE
